LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PAUL PERDUE'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO MR. PERDUE FILING ANOTHER GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT. MR. PERDUE CAN REFILE A MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT BASED ON THE EXACT SAME SETTLEMENT, BUT NEEDS TO EITHER PROVIDE INFORMATION ABOUT MR. WONG'S RANGE OF POSSIBLE DAMAGES AGAINST THE AGEMIAN DEFENDANTS AND/OR PROVIDE A FACTUAL RECORD SHOWING THAT THERE IS ESSENTIALLY NO CHANCE THAT MR. PERDUE WOULD BE HELD LIABLE FOR ANY DAMAGES AGAINST THE AGEMIAN DEFENDANTS' CROSS CLAIM AGAINST HIM. COUNSEL FOR AGEMIAN TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kristin Iversen, Esq. 415-788-1900 for DEFENDANT/Cross-Defendant PAUL PERDUE on the Court's telephone.
Edward Garson, Esq. 415-433-0990 of Wilson Elser for Defendant Agemian, Fang, Agemian & Fang.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PAUL PERDUE's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Denied without Prejudice to Mr. Perdue filing another good faith settlement. Mr. Perdue can refile a motion for good faith settlement based on the exact same settlement, but needs to either provide information about Mr. Wong's range of possible damages against the Agemian Defendants and/or provide a factual record showing that there is essentially no chance that Mr. Perdue would be held liable for any damages against the Agemian defendants' Cross Claim against him.

Counsel for Agemian to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
